## 8. Key Observations & Recommendations

### 8.1 Strengths
- **Zero error rate** across 10,599 messages — no tool errors or agent failures recorded
- **Solid grounded response rate** (76%) — majority of responses cite evidence
- **Healthy database** — consistent threading, no orphan messages, well-structured channels
- **No user corrections** in last 72h suggests good response quality

### 8.2 Gaps & Risks
1. **No retrieval usage in 72h** — search_messages/search_wiki were never called, meaning the agent operated on context alone. For complex queries this increases hallucination risk.
2. **No active cron jobs** — the knowledge-pipeline (channel summarization, wiki maintenance) is not scheduled.
3. **No promoted memories** — validated facts are not being persisted to long-term memory.
4. **17 tasks stuck in backlog** — accumulated test tasks without completion or prioritization.
5. **9 failed threads** — some execution paths need investigation (e.g., empty response handling tests in threads 109–111).
6. **No plugins/skills installed** — the system operates at base capability with no reusable workflow definitions.

### 8.3 Recommended Actions

| Priority | Action | Rationale |
|----------|--------|-----------|
| **High** | Activate knowledge-pipeline cron | Prevent context drift, keep wiki/summaries up to date |
| **Medium** | Review & promote validated facts to memory | Persist threading verification results, parent_id resolution findings |
| **Medium** | Clean up kanban backlog | Archive or execute stale test tasks |
| **Low** | Investigate 9 failed threads | Identify failure patterns (threads 106, 109-111) |
| **Low** | Install relevant plugins/skills | Extend agent capabilities for recurring workflows |
